prompt: Board meeting — I'm thinking about launching a paid newsletter for audio engineers who want to learn AI tools. Should I go for it? What's the play here?

assertions.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents: Strategist, Editor, Recruiter
Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
Total discussion before Board Recommendation is 400 words or fewer
Board Recommendation section exists and is 80 words or fewer
Each agent surfaces at least one realistic risk or counterpoint from their domain
Agents reference or engage with what prior speakers said — not isolated monologues
Ends with 'Approve, amend, or reject?' or close equivalent
Strategist references 3-axis check, market sizing, or revenue/unit economics concepts
Editor references Scan Test, clarity, or signal-to-noise concepts
Recruiter references calibration protocol, team dynamics, or people-oriented concerns
